final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial still life photography
Primary request: wabi-sabi style still life emphasizing the beauty of imperfection and traces of time
Scene/backdrop: weathered wooden table with visible grain and patina, soft window light
Subject: coarse earthenware vase with uneven texture, dried bare branches arranged inside
Style/medium: fine art still life photography, wabi-sabi aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium close-up, slightly off-center placement, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: natural daylight streaming diagonally from a window, soft diffused light with gentle shadows, contemplative and serene
Color palette: muted earth tones, warm browns, off-whites, subtle grays, desaturated palette
Materials/textures: rough unglazed terracotta, cracked and weathered wood grain, brittle dried twigs, dust particles in light
Constraints: preserve the asymmetry and imperfection central to wabi-sabi philosophy, emphasize texture over perfection
Avoid: symmetrical composition, saturated colors, polished surfaces, plastic textures, harsh artificial lighting
